mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ${tableName} ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT a.attname as column_name, pg_catalog.format_type(a.atttypid, a.atttypmod) as data_type FROM pg_index i JOIN pg_attribute a ON a.attrelid = i.indrelid AND a.attnum = ANY(i.indkey) WHERE i.indrelid = #{tableName}::regclass AND i.indisprimary LIMIT 1
